summary: Decent performance from the 1987 five‑night run, captured on an unknown source; magical vibe despite not being a top show.
review: The reviewer notes that while this particular concert isn’t among the very best of the year, it still carries the usual Dead magic and was part of a memorable five‑night stint. No specific comments are made about the recording itself, so the technical quality remains unclear.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments on sound clarity, mix or source type were provided.
